refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and ties it explicitly to customer-defined limits and network conditions, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and verify compliance with customer-defined limits.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive bitrate and error correction algorithms for teleoperation data streams.
DP2: Use redundant communication channels to reduce effective packet loss.
DP3: Real-time packet loss monitoring and feedback control loop.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement adaptive bitrate and error correction algorithms for teleoperation data streams.

potential_sources: Interaction between adaptive bitrate control and teleoperation command latency.
Dependency on network link quality and telemetry data.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically addresses the FR with minimal coupling to other system functions; error correction and bitrate adaptation are localized to teleoperation communication.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk that adaptive algorithms may introduce latency affecting operator control.
Risk of insufficient error correction under extreme network degradation.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating real-time monitoring (DP3) in next decomposition level to enhance robustness.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Software and hardware modules responsible for teleoperation communication, including adaptive bitrate and error correction logic.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Interface for sending and receiving teleoperation data packets over the network.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to report communication quality metrics such as packet loss to the NGHE Solution.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives teleoperation commands from the NGHE Solution or operator.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of DP1 logic within Teleoperation module; low diffusion as adaptive bitrate and error correction are centralized here.
NGHE Solution oversees overall system but does not directly implement adaptive bitrate logic.
Vehicle module has minimal direct involvement in communication quality control.
Safety Services unrelated to teleoperation packet loss control.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Adaptive bitrate and error correction algorithms are best contained within the Teleoperation module to minimize diffusion and maintain clear ownership.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with NGHE Solution for telemetry reporting.
Risk of insufficient coordination with Safety Services if packet loss impacts safety alerts.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify interface contracts between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution for telemetry and tasking to reduce integration risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (adaptive bitrate and error correction) directly addresses the refined FR with clear verification methods and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Minor diffusion risk exists if telemetry reporting interfaces are not well defined.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment within Teleoperation module is strong, supporting clear ownership and modularity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification of packet loss performance is feasible via telemetry data and network testing.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Allocation of DP to Teleoperation module is clear and aligns with known interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Define detailed interface specifications for Teleoperation to NGHE Solution telemetry reporting.
Plan for integration testing to validate packet loss under customer network conditions.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition sufficiently refines the FR, selects a suitable DP, and assigns it to an appropriate IM with clear interfaces and ownership. Verification and integration risks are manageable with recommended revisions.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

revise.why: To clarify and formalize interface contracts between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules to reduce integration risks.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Customer-defined packet loss limits are achievable with adaptive bitrate and error correction.
open_risks: Latency introduced by adaptive algorithms may affect operator control.
Integration complexity between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution telemetry interfaces.
evidence_needed: Performance test data showing packet loss under various network conditions.
Interface specification documents for Teleoperation telemetry reporting.
